title: For Volunteers

hero.heading: For Volunteers
hero.subheading: At Juma, our volunteers are crucial to what we do and have a direct impact on our youth.

intro: Juma welcomes individual volunteers on a rolling basis for our LEARN program. Volunteers can support by conducting mock interviews, reviewing and offering feedback on resumes, or conducting professional development workshops, including financial capability. Corporate volunteer opportunities include hosting career tours and panels or supporting a shift at the stadiums. These experiences help us introduce young people to a variety of career options they may not have considered. Your involvement can inspire young people to explore their interests, discover new passions, and gain meaningful insight into future opportunities.

benefits.title: Individual Volunteer Opportunities
benefits.body: Support our LEARN program by conducting mock interviews, reviewing and offering feedback on resumes, or conducting professional development workshops, including financial capability.

benefits.title: Corporate Volunteer Opportunities
benefits.body: Host career tours and panels or support a shift at the stadiums.

sections.body:
Juma welcomes individual volunteers on a rolling basis for our LEARN program. Volunteers can support by conducting mock interviews, reviewing and offering feedback on resumes, or conducting professional development workshops, including financial capability. Corporate volunteer opportunities include hosting career tours and panels or supporting a shift at the stadiums. These experiences help us introduce young people to a variety of career options they may not have considered. Your involvement can inspire young people to explore their interests, discover new passions, and gain meaningful insight into future opportunities.

If you are unable to fill out the form, please email Olivia at [oliviah@juma.org](mailto:oliviah@juma.org).
